entries.title: UDS Observation Log: operator-togglable debug visibility via unimatrix_server::obs target
Pre-existing pool timeout failures in unimatrix-server unit tests (GH#303)
Lazy-loading ONNX service handle: generalized state machine for any optional inference provider
